PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\E--Download-E-drive-lux-living-project-2026-final\\26070d68-7499-4222-92e8-cff5cc562948\\scratchpad\\handoff\\website-ui-improvement-request\\project\\LuxLiving Site.dc.html"; $dst = "E:\\Download E drive\\lux living project 2026 final\\js"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dst | Out-Null; $lines = Get-Content $src -Encoding UTF8; $slice = $lines[1174..1472]; $out = @\("// LuxLiving catalog data — ported from the Claude Design prototype \(LuxLiving Site.dc.html\)", "// Categories, products, brands, craft-tour slides, techniques, testimonials and Instagram posts.", "class LuxData {"\) + $slice + @\("}", "window.LUX = new LuxData\(\);"\); Set-Content -Path \(Join-Path $dst "data.js"\) -Value $out -Encoding UTF8; \(Get-Content \(Join-Path $dst "data.js"\) | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const src=fs.readFileSync\('E:/Download E drive/lux living project 2026 final/js/data.js','utf8'\);eval\(src.replace\('window.LUX','globalThis.LUX'\)\);const ids=LUX._products\(\).map\(p=>p.id\);const dupes=ids.filter\(\(x,i\)=>ids.indexOf\(x\)!==i\);console.log\('dupe ids:',dupes.length?dupes:'none'\);const subs={};LUX._products\(\).forEach\(p=>{const c=LUX._categories\(\).find\(c=>c.key===p.cat\);if\(c.tabs.length>1&&!c.tabs.includes\(p.sub\)\)subs[p.id]=p.cat+'/'+p.sub}\);console.log\('bad subs:',Object.keys\(subs\).length?subs:'none'\);const per={};LUX._products\(\).forEach\(p=>per[p.cat]=\(per[p.cat]||0\)+1\);console.log\(per\)")
